release_review.summary: Desktop Local Runtime startup is local-only, while provider-local use moves to an explicit runtime-control provider-link contract with observable Runtime Service capability and binding state.
checked_surfaces: Runtime Service provider_link capability and binding normalization
Desktop startup reports and attachable runtime state runtime_control metadata
Desktop Welcome Local Environment Open and Start Runtime separation
Desktop Welcome provider Connect Local Runtime and Disconnect Local Runtime actions
Runtime-control provider-link HTTP authorization and structured errors
Runtime provider bootstrap exchange, config persistence, and control-channel lifecycle
Local UI health and runtime state token exposure boundaries
